option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[proctolearn] 192.168.1.100 ansible_user=ubuntu ansible_port=2222 ansible_ssh_private_key_file=~/.ssh/id_ed25519
# For running Ansible directly on this machine (local mode): # [proctolearn] # 127.0.0.1 ansible_user=arsen ansible_connection=local

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[proctolearn] 127.0.0.1 ansible_user=arsen ansible_connection=local ansible_port=2222 ansible_ssh_private_key_file=~/.ssh/id_ed25519
# Remote VM mode (uncomment when running against external VM): # [proctolearn] # 192.168.1.100 ansible_user=ubuntu ansible_port=2222 ansible_ssh_private_key_file=~/.ssh/id_ed25519
